channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jenn Nawada: Landscape Designer and TV Personality with Roots in Vermont Farming
item.description: Jenn Nawada, a renowned landscape designer and TV personality, credits her early experiences on a Vermont farm for shaping her career. The article highlights her journey from agricultural roots to bec...

item.title: Controversy Surrounds Argentina's Tactics and Messi's Role in World Cup Final
item.description: The article explores the controversy surrounding Argentina's 2026 World Cup campaign, focusing on the anti-Lionel Messi sentiment among fans. It highlights allegations that Argentina used physical tac...

item.title: Former Adviser Warns Trump's Personality Flaws Put U.S. in Risk of Escalating Conflict with Iran
item.description: A former White House insider, Miles Taylor, warns that President Donald Trump's personality flaws make him dangerously vulnerable to Iran's efforts to escalate the conflict. The article details how Tr...

item.title: Australian Candidate Challenges Nigel Farage in UK By-Election
item.description: Nigel Farage, leader of Reform UK, faces a by-election in Clacton after resigning over a donations scandal. The election, scheduled for August 13, sees Farage contesting against joke candidates like C...

item.title: Troops Foil Terrorist Attack, Recover Weapons in Yobe State

item.title: Ontario Faces Record Wildfire Season with Over 7,250 km² Burned
item.description: Ontario is experiencing its most severe wildfire season on record, with over 7,250 square kilometers of forest burned, surpassing the previous 2021 record. The majority of this destruction occurred in...

item.title: Technology Empowers Small Traders in Tanzania's Informal Economy
item.description: Digital transformation is revolutionizing Tanzania's informal trading sector, offering small-scale entrepreneurs new tools to enhance their businesses. Mobile money platforms enable secure transaction...

item.title: Charlotte Gainsbourg's 1990s Journey: From Anxiety to Artistic Triumph

item.title: DILG Promotes Unified 911 for Enhanced Emergency Response

item.title: Voice actor Nick Apostolides discusses musical influences for Resident Evil's Leon Kennedy

item.title: Melbourne Demons Prepare for Talent Scramble with Tasmania
item.description: Melbourne's AFL club, the Demons, have acknowledged their readiness for Tasmania's potential talent poaching, according to coach Steven King. The admission comes amid growing concerns about interstate...

item.title: Nedbank Completes Takeover of NCBA with Excess Share Acceptance
item.description: Nedbank Group's takeover offer for NCBA Group PLC closed on 10 July 2026, with shareholders tendering over 1.3 billion shares—far exceeding the 66% stake initially sought. Valid acceptances covered 79...

item.title: Sleep Country Acquires Sleep Number for $700 Million, Expands U.S. Operations
item.description: Sleep Country Canada ZZZ-T has announced its expansion into the U.S. market through the acquisition of Sleep Number, a Minneapolis-based company, in a deal valued at approximately US$702 million. The ...

item.title: Tanzanian Graduates Struggle with Competitive Job Market and Informal Sector Challenges
item.description: Thousands of Tanzanian graduates are entering a job market marked by intense competition and limited formal employment opportunities. Despite a slight drop in the national unemployment rate from 8.9% ...

item.title: Jamaat-i-Islami Launches Nationwide Protest Against Petroleum Levy
item.description: Jamaat-i-Islami Pakistan (JI) emir Hafiz Naeemur Rehman announced a nationwide highway blockade and sit-ins on August 7 as part of the second phase of the party’s anti-petroleum levy and anti-inflatio...

item.title: Latitude Festival 2026 celebrates 20th anniversary with Transgressive Records' curated lineup
item.description: Transgressive Records has unveiled its stage takeover lineup for Latitude Festival 2026, marking the festival's 20th anniversary at Henham Park, Suffolk. The event, running from July 23-26, features a...
